ticket.title: Draft Terms of Service & Privacy Policy
ticket.description: Draft and review the V1-scoped ToS and Privacy Policy: credit terms, user-owned content, AI output 'as is', data handling.

candidate_memory.link_reason: the credit terms the ToS states

code_agent.rationale: Code sees the ticket scope, the credit terms, and the PRD; the rejected a PR decision is withheld, workspace/release entries out of scope, Jordan's note local.

qa_agent.rationale: QA sees the ticket scope; the rejected decision is withheld, project/workspace entries out of scope, Jordan's note local. The launch plan is in scope (release) but irrelevant to legal review — optional.

design_agent.rationale: Design sees the scope/credit/policy/PRD; the rejected decision withheld, release/local out, conventions tangential to legal — optional.

product_agent.rationale: Product sees the widest set — scope, credit, policy, PRD, the launch plan, conventions; the rejected a PR decision is withheld and Jordan's note is local.

human_teammate.rationale: Robin sees every team entry including the rejected a PR decision; only Jordan's local legal note is invisible.
